title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 375.1140 - Effective date
text:
375.1140.  Effective date. — Sections 375.1110 to 375.1140 shall take effect on July 1, 1992.  No insurer or reinsurer may continue to use the services of a reinsurance intermediary on and after July 1, 1992, unless such use is in compliance with sections 375.1110 to 375.1140.
(L. 1991 H.B. 385, et al. § 49) 
Effective 7-01-92
